goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 14:45' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south' and should be in the type of 'concerthall'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave after 14:45 and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south and should be in the type of concerthall
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get postcode and address
